title: Security Steering Committee Minutes - Q2 2026 (Draft)
text: Draft minutes for the second-quarter session. The committee reviewed progress on the zero-trust segmentation plan, with the first network zone now enforced. The expanded logging retention is live and already supported one investigation. Discussion covered vendor-access reviews and a proposed tabletop exercise for the ransomware response plan in the next quarter. Actions were assigned with owners. Synthetic governance record for indexing demonstrations.
